Tsabitah Kawiswara

Hello, I am Tsabitah Kawiswara — an Information Systems student with a passion for graphic design and creative visual communication. I enjoy transforming ideas into elegant and meaningful designs.

PRESENTED BY : Tsabitah Kawiswara EMAIL : bitataswara@email.com

Get to Know Me

I am an Information Systems student at Universitas Mulawarman with a strong passion for graphic design and visual creativity. I enjoy combining technology and artistic expression to create elegant and meaningful visual concepts. My goal is to develop myself as a professional graphic designer who can deliver impactful and aesthetically pleasing visual solutions.
